O0400A4_SPCH_THRPY_DAY_NUM O0400A4_SPCH_THRPY_DAY_NUM O0400A4 Number of Days Speech Therapy/Audiology Administered CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that speech-language pathology and audiology services were administered for at least 15 minutes in the last seven days. discontinued 09/30/2025
514 O0400A5_SPCH_THRPY_STRT_DT O0400A5_SPCH_THRPY_STRT_DT O0400A5 Speech Therapy/Audiology Start Date CHAR 8 The data in this column indicates the start date for the most recent
